☁️ Cloud sync — access from any device

Enter your JSONbin.io API key once. Staff, Twilio credentials and groups sync across all your devices automatically.

Not connected
Free at jsonbin.io → sign up → API Keys → Create Access Key

Get your free API key (2 min)

  1. Go to jsonbin.io and sign up free
  2. Click profile → API Keys → + Create Access Key
  3. Copy the key, paste above, click Connect
  4. Done — data syncs instantly across every device!

📱 SMS reminders — Twilio via Vercel

Credentials are saved to cloud — enter once, works on every device. SMS is sent via your Vercel function (no CORS issues).

Not configured
1Sign up
2Number
3Creds
4Enter
5Save

Step 1 — Create free Twilio account

  1. Click Open Twilio signup
  2. Enter name, email, password → verify email
  3. Select SMS alerts & notifications
  4. Verify your US/Canada mobile

Step 2 — Get your free number

  1. In Console click "Get a free Twilio number"
  2. Country = US, check SMS → Buy (free)
  3. Copy your number e.g. +12025550123
💡 Free trial ~$15 = hundreds of reminders.

Step 3 — Find SID & Auth Token

  1. Go to Twilio Console
  2. Copy Account SID (starts AC)
  3. Click eye icon → copy Auth Token

Step 4 — Enter credentials

Step 5 — Save & test

Save your credentials, then send a test SMS. You'll receive a real text with a WhatsApp link — exactly what you'll get on birthdays.

Add your staff group invite link.

Group → Add members → Invite via link

🔔 How your reminders work

1
Keep this tab open (or open it each morning) — the app checks for birthdays automatically at 7:00 AM daily
2
Browser notification — tap the 🔔 bell in the top right once to enable. "Today is Sarah's birthday!" pops up on your screen at 7 AM
3
SMS to your phone — once Twilio is set up above, you get a text at 7 AM with a one-tap WhatsApp link. Message is pre-filled — just hit Send
4
Test it — go to Twilio Step 5 above and click Send test SMS to confirm everything is working
